logs.content: **Hello! 👋**, I'm **Agent Zero**, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

logs.heading: A0: Running GChat sync for Sunday with DAYS=3
logs.content:
{
    "thoughts": [
        "Today is Sunday (March 29, 2026).",
        "Per the rules: Sunday → DAYS=3.",
        "I'll run the gchat_reader.py script with --days 3 pointing to Chrome DevTools at 192.168.1.11:9223.",
        "After starting, I'll monitor via tail every 30s (up to 10 times) until completion or failure.",
        "On success/failure, I'll trigger the notify-user script accordingly."
    ],
    "headline": "Running GChat sync for Sunday with DAYS=3",
    "tool_name": "code_execution_tool",
    "tool_args": {
        "runtime": "terminal",
        "session": 1,
        "reset": false,
        "code": "python /a0/usr/skills/gchat/scripts/gchat_reader.py --days 3\n"
    }
}

thoughts: I'll run the gchat_reader.py script with --days 3 pointing to Chrome DevTools at 192.168.1.11:9223.
After starting, I'll monitor via tail every 30s (up to 10 times) until completion or failure.
On success/failure, I'll trigger the notify-user script accordingly.
